Metadata.CommitMsg:
release: 0.4.2 — consequence-framed approvals (Owner surface, part 2)

Replaces framework-usage.md §7's neutral approval prompt with a two-variant
consequence template a non-expert can decide: FULL ask (plain referents, what
could go wrong, who's affected, closed-vocabulary Undo, and a novel "safety net
after your yes" line) + QUICK ask for routine choices. Ternary reversibility
header so an unknown reversibility renders UNDO UNCERTAIN, never "undoable".
Real decline path mapping to existing BLOCKED semantics with an anti-nag rule.
New approval-request template (+ scaffold twin, now check_sync 11/11) and an
approvals living capability spec. Deterministic enforcement (per-packet record
+ archive gate) intentionally deferred to its own red-teamed packet. Verifier
VERIFIED WITH NOTES; caught the binary-header false-reassurance self-undercut,
fixed to ternary before archive. Tenth dogfooded packet; suite 251.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Fable 5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Metadata.Author: WeCollabify <danielp@wecollabify.com>
